qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: In which one of the following page replacement policies, Belady's anomaly may occur? A. FIFO B. Optimal C. LRU D. MRU

qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: A system uses FIFO policy for system replacement. It has page frames with no pages loaded to begin with. The system first accesses distinct pages in some order and then accesses the same pages but now in the reverse order. How many page faults will occur? A. B. C. D.
